title: Cain Robb
extract:
Cain Robb (born (2003-01-05)5 January 2003) is an English professional rugby league footballer who plays as a hooker for Castleford Tigers in the Super League.
He has spent time on loan at Salford Red Devils in the Super League, and at Whitehaven, Swinton Lions and Batley Bulldogs in the RFL Championship.
